primary_contact: Rina Wulandari, Head of Enterprise Sales

security_evidence.soc2_scope: Document storage and access control systems
security_evidence.encryption_at_rest: AES-256 for all stored documents and backups
security_evidence.penetration_testing: Annual pen test by independent firm, last: Dec 2024, clean report shared
security_evidence.vulnerability_scanning: Weekly automated scans, all critical findings remediated within 48 hours
security_evidence.incident_response_plan: Documented and shared with clients, includes 4-hour notification SLA
security_evidence.access_controls: RBAC + MFA for all accounts, SSO via SAML 2.0
security_evidence.logging_monitoring: SIEM with real-time alerting, 365-day log retention
security_evidence.employee_background_checks: All employees undergo background verification before hiring
security_evidence.security_awareness_training: Quarterly mandatory training for all staff

privacy_evidence.dpa_reviewed: Signed DPA with clear data handling obligations
privacy_evidence.retention_policy: Active documents retained per contract. Deleted documents purged within 30 days, including backups.
privacy_evidence.sub_processor_policy: All sub-processors listed in DPA Annex B, 30-day notice for changes
privacy_evidence.cross_border_transfers: Backups in Singapore, covered by ASEAN Model Contractual Clauses
privacy_evidence.dpia_conducted: Yes, completed March 2024, no high-risk findings
privacy_evidence.consent_mechanism: Not applicable — B2B document storage, no personal data processed
privacy_evidence.data_subject_rights: Data export and deletion available via admin dashboard, 72-hour turnaround
privacy_evidence.privacy_policy: Detailed vendor-specific privacy notice available at /privacy-enterprise

key_personnel: CFO: Dewi Lestari (CPA, 15 years enterprise finance)
client_references: 12 mid-size companies in manufacturing and logistics

sla_terms.support_response: 1 hour for critical, 4 hours for high, 24 hours for standard
sla_terms.data_portability: Full export via admin API, no notice required
sla_terms.termination_clause: 30-day notice, data deletion within 30 days with certificate of destruction
